Off Calendar Mar-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's Motion to Remove Case from Arbitration Hearing List Pursuant to San Francisco Loca Rule 4.2 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered Mediation Order to Show Cause set on 4/23/2003 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Jury Trial of 8/25/2003 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206 is ordered set. Court to give notice of Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
